name: Lucent Technologies
description: Lucent Technologies, Inc. was a prominent American multinational telecommunications equipment company headquartered in Murray Hill, New Jersey. Established on September 30, 1996, through the divestiture of the AT&T Technologies business unit of AT&T Corporation, the company focused on providing innovative networking hardware, software, and services to service providers and enterprises worldwide. Lucent was widely recognized for its research arm, Bell Labs, which pioneered numerous technological advancements. The company operated until December 1, 2006, when it merged with the French company Alcatel to form Alcatel-Lucent, which was later acquired by Nokia.
